reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.content: Excellent service from start to finish. I highly recommend (A) Collector Vehicles for any antique appraisal needs.

reviews.author: Jennifer R.

business.yearsInBusiness: (B) Art & Memorabilia supports collectors, estates, and insurers with antique valuation work in Thunder Bay, ON.
business.pricing: Appraisal fees vary by collection size and complexity. Contact (B) Art & Memorabilia in Thunder Bay, ON for a tailored quote.

services: Primarily Northwestern ON(Thunder Bayto Manitoba border)[1].

content.about: (B) Art & Memorabilia provides professional antique appraisal services specializing in Antique Furniture, Vintage Collectibles, Estate Items. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
content.notes: Serving Thunder Bay, ON clients who need antique valuations in Antique Furniture, Vintage Collectibles, Estate Items.

reviews.author: Nancy T.
reviews.content: Their knowledge of antique furniture values was exceptional. The documentation they provided was detailed and perfect for my insurance needs.

reviews.author: Karen M.
reviews.content: They took the time to explain the historical significance of my antique pieces and provided a thorough valuation process.

reviews.author: James B.
reviews.content: I needed an appraisal for a charitable donation of my antique collection, and (B) Art & Memorabilia delivered excellent service. All tax requirements were met perfectly.

reviews.author: Michael S.
reviews.content: Very responsive and easy to work with. (B) Art & Memorabilia's expertise with my antique pocket watch collection was impressive.

reviews.author: Robert A.
reviews.content: Their knowledge of 19th century antique furniture made the appraisal process smooth and thorough.

address.formatted: 133 W Frederica St, Thunder Bay, ON

content.about: Black Cat Antiques has been in operation since 1993, located in the historic Westfort Village of Thunder Bay, ON. They offer professional antique appraisals and sales from their West Frederica Street location.
content.notes: In operation since 1993. 133 W Frederica St, Thunder Bay, ON. Listed on YellowPages.ca.

content.about: Lakehead Antique Appraisals specializes in Northern Ontario and Great Lakes region antiques, serving Thunder Bay and northwestern Ontario. They provide professional valuations for fur trade era items, Indigenous art, and historical artifacts.

Northern Ontario Estate Appraisals serves Thunder Bay and the surrounding northwestern Ontario region with comprehensive antique and estate appraisal services. They handle estate settlements, insurance valuations, and charitable donation appraisals.
content.notes: Serving Thunder Bay and northwestern Ontario.

content.about: Fort William Antiques is located in Thunder Bay's historic Fort William area, offering professional antique appraisals and a curated selection of Canadiana, furniture, and collectibles.
content.notes: Located in the historic Fort William area of Thunder Bay, ON.
